File Location: STAM.txt
Content:
####### MAC ####### To run the server:
java -Ddw.graphhopper.datareader.file=export.osm -jar graphhopper-web-11.0.jar server config.yml


####### WINDOWS #######To run the server:
java "-Ddw.graphhopper.datareader.file=export.osm" -jar graphhopper-web-11.0.jar server config.yml


#######  MAC  ####### Remove Cache from FAST-Routing-Server diractory:
rm -rf graph-cache


#######  WINDOWS  ####### Remove Cache from FAST-Routing-Server diractory:
Remove-Item -Recurse -Force graph-cache


####### URL of localhost Server:
http://localhost:8080


####### Pull Command:
git pull origin main


####### Push Command:
git add .
git commit -m "Update"
git push origin main

----------------------------------------
File Location: FAST-Routing-Server/.gitignore
Content:
graphhopper-web-*.jar
export.osm
graph-cache/
----------------------------------------
File Location: FAST-Routing-Server/config.yml
Content:
graphhopper:
  datareader.file: export.osm
  graph.location: graph-cache
  import.osm.ignored_highways: footway,cycleway,path,pedestrian,steps
  graph.encoded_values: car_access, car_average_speed

  profiles:
    - name: ambulance_routine
      custom_model:
        distance_influence: 15
        speed:
          - if: "true"
            limit_to: "car_average_speed"
        priority:
          - if: "!car_access"
            multiply_by: 0

    - name: ambulance_emergency
      custom_model:
        distance_influence: 15
        speed:
          - if: "true"
            limit_to: "car_average_speed"
        priority:
          - if: "!car_access"
            multiply_by: 0.1

  server.application_connectors:
    - type: http
      port: 8080
      bind_host: localhost
----------------------------------------
